app.rdg: 1. Stab kwi Sherk-Siam ?
1. stab k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
1. what the heaven nobleman
1. What is God?
Rol rech kwi Sherk-Siam whe la asared gwas haiduhcheh asared kwis halh a kwi Sherk-Siam.
x팳퉝ul퉢 x팳톛c팳 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab x퉝i툾 l톛툾톛s툾톛x팳id g퉝톛shaydx퉝c팳톛톫 툾톛s툾톛x팳id k퉝i sha툾톫 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
only spirit the sky nobleman not how know+we how the goodness of the sky nobleman
God is merely spirit; we are not able to know how much is the goodness of God.
2. Abstsokwab o kwi Sherk-Siam, rwekokru o, rebech o?
2. absc퉢uk퉢퉝톛b 툾u k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab, x팳퉝톛q퉝톛q퉢퉝 툾u, x팳ib톛c팳' 툾u.
2 has+body Q the sky nobleman, white Q, black Q
Does God have a body? Is He white? Is He black?
Whe la abstsokwab kwi Sherk-Siam, whe la rwekokru whe la rebech.
x퉝i툾 l톛툾absc퉢uk퉢퉝톛b k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab, x퉝i툾 l톛x팳퉝톛q퉝톛q퉢퉝 x퉝i툾 l톛x팳ib톛c팳'.
not have+body the sky nobleman, not white, not black
He does not have a body. He is not white, He isn't black.
3. Tskwakred o a kwi Sherk-Siam ?
3. ck퉢퉝aqid 툾u 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
3. forever Q of the sky nobleman
3. Is God eternal?
E, tskwakred a kwi Sherk-Siam, tolal ku di tu haku tskwakred a kwi Sherk-Siam a al tih칥lh i kwi tlhba tskwakred tlus as.
툾i, ck퉢퉝aqid 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab, tul퉢툾al k퉝톛di툾 tuha툾k퉝 ck퉢퉝aqid 툾톛 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab 툾a 툾al ti툾i톫 툾i k퉝i 톫톛b톛ck퉢퉝aqid 톫us툾a툾s.
yes forever of the sky nobleman, from the long_ago forever of the sky nobleman exist to the and the future+forever future+exist
Yes, God is eternal, from the remote past God always existed, He exists now, and He will always exist.
4. Boku o dahu as kwi boku lilhchad kwi Sherk-Siam, gula boku o ashuts kwi bokw stab?
4. b톛k퉢퉝 툾u d톛x퉝툾as k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 li톫c팳ad k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab, g퉝톛l b톛k퉢퉝 툾u 툾톛shuyuc k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 stab?
4. all Q means the all which+way the sky nobleman, then all Q made the all thing
4. ??? and did he make everything that was made?
E, boku dahu as kwi boku lilhchad kwi Sherk-Siam, gula boku ashuts kwi boku stab.
툾i, b톛k퉢퉝 d톛x퉝툾as k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 li톫c팳ad k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab, g퉝톛l b톛k퉢퉝 툾톛shuyuc k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 stab.
yes all means the all which+way the sky nobleman, then all made the all thing
Yes, ??? and did he make everything that was made.
5. Whe la asared o gwas haiduhchelh asared kwerkru kwi Sherk-Siam?
5. x퉝i툾 l톛툾톛s툾톛x팳id 툾u g퉝톛shaydx퉝c팳톛톫 툾톛s툾톛x팳id q퉝iq퉢퉝 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
5. not how Q IRR+know+us how powerful the sky nobleman
5. Aren't we able to know how powerful God is?
Whe la asared gwas haiduhchelh asared kwerkru kwi Sherk-Siam;
x퉝i툾 l톛툾톛s툾톛x팳id g퉝톛shaydx퉝c팳톛톫 툾톛s툾톛x팳id q퉝iq퉢퉝 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab
not how IRR+know+us how powerful the sky nobleman
We are not able to know how powerful God is;
yare boku stab kria dhual tsid칥lh.
y톛x팳i b톛k퉢퉝 stab kria dx퉝툾al c톛di톫
but all things rien=nothing unto him
but all things are nothing unto him.
